'''kayubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylanesterase|xylanesterase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylanesterase|xylanesterase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kayubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæyibith|kæyibith]] || [[word:kæyibij|kæyibij]] || [[word:kæyibish|kæyibish]] || [[word:kæyibi|kæyibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayuyubuth|kayuyubuth]] || [[word:kayuyubuj|kayuyubuj]] || [[word:kayuyubush|kayuyubush]] || [[word:kayuyubu|kayuyubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayubuth|kayubuth]] || [[word:kayubuj|kayubuj]] || [[word:kayubush|kayubush]] || [[word:kayubu|kayubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayufbuth|kayufbuth]] || [[word:kayufbuj|kayufbuj]] || [[word:kayufbush|kayufbush]] || [[word:kayufbuf|kayufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kayubuthu|kayubuthu]] || [[word:kayubuju|kayubuju]] || [[word:kayubushu|kayubushu]] || [[word:kayubuku|kayubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kayubuth|kayubuth]] || [[word:kayubuj|kayubuj]] || [[word:kayubush|kayubush]] || [[word:kayubu|kayubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kayubuthul|kayubuthul]] || [[word:kayubujul|kayubujul]] || [[word:kayubushul|kayubushul]] || [[word:kayubukul|kayubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kayubuthuthu|kayubuthuthu]] || [[word:kayubujuju|kayubujuju]] || [[word:kayubushushu|kayubushushu]] || [[word:kayubuku|kayubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kayubuthun|kayubuthun]] || [[word:kayubujun|kayubujun]] || [[word:kayubushun|kayubushun]] || [[word:kayubukun|kayubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kayubuthuoro|kayubuthuoro]] || [[word:kayubujuoro|kayubujuoro]] || [[word:kayubushuoro|kayubushuoro]] || [[word:kayubukuoro|kayubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
